caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing a light-colored long-sleeved shirt under a white sleeveless vest, stands behind a wooden podium. He is delivering a speech in a room featuring a textured green wall with a geometric pattern and tall, slender cylindrical pillars containing pink flowers. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures with his hands. In the beginning, he looks slightly to his right with his mouth open, gesturing with his right hand. He then shifts his gaze forward, remains steady for a moment, and then lowers his gaze while moving his hands across the surface of the podium. The background and his attire remain constant throughout the clip as he focuses on his delivery.
